executives.name: André Tessier
executives.background: Mr. Tessier has over 35 years of experience in the mining industry. He has held various executive positions and has been involved in several mineral discoveries. He is a Professional Geologist and holds a B.Sc. in Geology from the University of Montreal and an M.Sc. in Economic Geology from Queen's University.

tenure_dates.title: President, Chief Executive Officer and Director

executives.name: Nathalie Laurin
executives.background: Ms. Laurin has over 30 years of experience in administration and accounting. She has served as CFO for several public companies in the resource sector.

executives.name: Michel Chapdelaine
executives.background: Mr. Chapdelaine is a Professional Geologist with over 25 years of experience in mineral exploration and development, particularly in Quebec and Ontario.

board_of_directors.name: Frank Mariage
board_of_directors.background: Mr. Mariage is a partner at Fasken Martineau DuMoulin LLP, specializing in securities law and mining law. He has been recognized as a leading lawyer in the mining sector.

tenure_dates.role: Chairman of the Board and Independent Director

board_of_directors.name: André Tessier
board_of_directors.background: Mr. Tessier has over 35 years of experience in the mining industry. He has held various executive positions and has been involved in several mineral discoveries.

board_of_directors.name: Michel Chapdelaine
board_of_directors.background: Mr. Chapdelaine is a Professional Geologist with over 25 years of experience in mineral exploration and development.

board_of_directors.name: Roy Millington
board_of_directors.background: Mr. Millington is a retired lawyer with extensive experience in corporate governance and the mining industry, having served as Corporate Secretary for major mining firms.

board_of_directors.name: Sara Paquet
board_of_directors.background: Ms. Paquet has over 20 years of experience in finance and corporate management. She currently holds a senior executive position in a private corporation.

sources.source_description: Company Website - Board of Directors Page
